mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM (SELECT c.id, c.contract_no, c.contract_type, c.company_id, c.company_name, c.our_company_name, c.`status`, c.contract_status, c.appoint_pay_full_time, c.match_user_id, c.match_user_name, c.total_amount, c.total_number, c.dealed_amount, c.warehouse_number, c.billed_amount, c.dept_id, c.business_type, c.seal_flg, c.seal_date, c.breach_days, c.match_credit_flg, c.contract_time, c.business_kind, c.final_total_amount, c.confirm_receive_number, c.receipt_arrived_flg, c.apply_cancel_flg, b.total_amount buyTotalAmount, b.billed_amount buyBilledAmount, bc.approve_id AS billedApproveId FROM t_ctr_contract_settlement r INNER JOIN t_ctr_contract c ON r.sell_contract_id = c.id INNER JOIN t_ctr_contract b ON r.buy_contract_id = b.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT b.contract_id, b.invoice_date, b.approve_id FROM t_apply_invoice b WHERE b.STATUS IN ( 'A', 'D' ) AND b.contract_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY b.contract_id HAVING MAX( b.invoice_date ) ) bc ON c.id = bc.contract_id WHERE c.contract_status != 'C' AND c.STATUS != 'C' AND c.contract_type = 'S' AND c.business_type = 'ZY-BB' AND c.enterprise_id = 44 AND c.seal_flg = TRUE AND (c.warehouse_number < c.total_number OR c.dealed_amount < c.total_amount OR c.billed_amount < c.total_amount)
and c.match_user_id in
#{matchUserIdList[${index}]}
ORDER BY c.contract_time DESC) result WHERE 1=1
AND result.warehouse_number < result.total_number
AND result.dealed_amount < result.total_amount
AND result.billed_amount < result.total_amount

SELECT * FROM (SELECT c.id, c.contract_no, c.contract_type, c.company_id, c.company_name, c.our_company_name, c.`status`, c.contract_status, c.appoint_pay_full_time, c.match_user_id, c.match_user_name, c.total_amount, c.total_number, c.dealed_amount, c.warehouse_number, c.billed_amount, c.dept_id, c.business_type, c.seal_flg, c.seal_date, c.breach_days, c.match_credit_flg, c.contract_time, c.products_name, c.business_kind, c.apply_cancel_flg, bc.approve_id AS billedApproveId FROM t_ctr_contract c LEFT JOIN ( SELECT b.contract_id, b.in_invoice_date, b.approve_id FROM t_apply_invoice_received b WHERE b.STATUS IN ( 'A', 'D' ) AND b.contract_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY b.contract_id HAVING MAX( b.in_invoice_date ) ) bc ON c.id = bc.contract_id WHERE c.contract_status != 'C' AND c.STATUS != 'C' AND c.contract_type = 'B' AND c.business_type = 'ZY-BB' AND c.enterprise_id = 44 AND c.seal_flg = TRUE AND c.billed_amount < c.total_amount
and c.match_user_id in
#{matchUserIdList[${index}]}
ORDER BY c.contract_time DESC) result WHERE 1=1
AND result.billed_amount < result.total_amount

SELECT count(1) budgetCount, process_name labelName FROM t_pm_approve WHERE 1=1
and create_user_id in
#{matchUserIdList[${index}]}
AND DATE_FORMAT(created_date, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{beginDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND `status` = 'A' AND process_name IN ('代采赊销预算','代采预算','赊销预算') GROUP BY process_name ORDER BY process_name ASC

SELECT count(1) count FROM t_pm_approve p INNER JOIN t_ctr_contract c ON p.contract_id = c.id WHERE p.process_name = '业务盖章申请' AND p.`status` = 'A' AND c.business_type = 'ZY-BB'
and c.match_user_id in
#{matchUserIdList[${index}]}
AND DATE_FORMAT(p.created_date, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{beginDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND c.contract_type = #{contractType} AND c.match_credit_flg = #{matchCreditFlg}
AND c.business_type_dcsx IN ( 'DCSX', 'DCSXBL', 'DCSXHDFK' )
AND c.business_type_dcsx NOT IN ( 'DCSX', 'DCSXBL', 'DCSXHDFK' )

SELECT count(1) count FROM t_pm_approve p INNER JOIN t_ctr_contract c ON p.contract_id = c.id WHERE p.process_name = '业务付款申请' AND p.`status` = 'A' AND c.business_type = 'ZY-BB'
and c.match_user_id in
#{matchUserIdList[${index}]}
AND DATE_FORMAT(p.created_date, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{beginDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND c.contract_type = #{contractType} AND c.match_credit_flg = #{matchCreditFlg}
AND c.business_type_dcsx IN ( 'DCSX', 'DCSXBL', 'DCSXHDFK' )
AND c.business_type_dcsx NOT IN ( 'DCSX', 'DCSXBL', 'DCSXHDFK' )

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT p.id approveId, p.process_name budgetName, p.`subject` subject, p.STATUS budgetStatus, p.curr_approver_user_id currApproveUserId, p.last_approve_user_name budgetApproveUserName, p.last_approve_date budgetApproveLastTime, p.created_date FROM t_pm_approve p WHERE 1=1
and p.create_user_id in
#{matchUserIdList[${index}]}
AND DATE_FORMAT(p.created_date, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{beginDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND `status` = 'A' AND process_name IN ('代采赊销预算','代采预算','赊销预算')
UNION
SELECT p.id approveId, p.process_name budgetName, p.`subject` subject, p.STATUS budgetStatus, p.curr_approver_user_id currApproveUserId, p.last_approve_user_name budgetApproveUserName, p.last_approve_date budgetApproveLastTime, p.created_date FROM t_pm_approve p INNER JOIN t_ctr_contract b ON p.id = b.approve_id WHERE b.contract_type='B' AND b.special_chain_flag = FALSE AND b.business_type = 'ZY-BB' AND (b.seal_flg = FALSE OR b.total_amount > b.dealed_amount)
and p.create_user_id in
#{matchUserIdList[${index}]}
AND DATE_FORMAT(p.created_date, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{beginDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND p.`status` = 'D' AND p.process_name IN ('代采赊销预算', '代采预算', '赊销预算')
UNION
SELECT p.id approveId, p.process_name budgetName, p.`subject` subject, p.STATUS budgetStatus, p.curr_approver_user_id currApproveUserId, p.last_approve_user_name budgetApproveUserName, p.last_approve_date budgetApproveLastTime, p.created_date FROM t_pm_approve p INNER JOIN t_ctr_contract s ON p.id = s.approve_id WHERE s.contract_type='S' AND s.business_type = 'ZY-BB' AND s.seal_flg = FALSE
and p.create_user_id in
#{matchUserIdList[${index}]}
AND DATE_FORMAT(p.created_date, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{beginDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND p.`status` = 'D' AND p.process_name IN ('代采赊销预算', '代采预算', '赊销预算') ) result order by created_date desc

SELECT c.id, c.contract_no, c.contract_type, c.special_chain_flag, c.approve_id, c.virtual_type, c.virtual_contract_id, c.virtual_contract_no FROM t_ctr_contract c WHERE c.approve_id in
#{approveIdList[${index}],jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select p.id approveId, p.contract_id contractId, p.process_name budgetName, p.`subject` subject, p.STATUS buySealStatus, p.curr_approver_user_id currApproveUserId, p.last_approve_user_name buySealApproveUserName, p.last_approve_date buySealApproveLastTime, p.created_date FROM t_pm_approve p WHERE p.process_name = '业务盖章申请' AND p.contract_id in
#{contractIdList[${index}],jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select p.id approveId, p.contract_id contractId, p.process_name budgetName, p.`subject` subject, p.STATUS sellSealStatus, p.curr_approver_user_id currApproveUserId, p.last_approve_user_name sellSealApproveUserName, p.last_approve_date sellSealApproveLastTime, p.created_date FROM t_pm_approve p WHERE p.process_name = '业务盖章申请' AND p.contract_id in
#{contractIdList[${index}],jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select p.id approveId, p.contract_id contractId, p.process_name budgetName, p.`subject` subject, p.STATUS buyPayStatus, p.curr_approver_user_id currApproveUserId, p.last_approve_user_name buyPayApproveUserName, p.last_approve_date buyPayApproveLastTime, p.created_date FROM t_pm_approve p WHERE p.process_name = '业务付款申请' AND p.status in('D','A') AND p.contract_id in
#{contractIdList[${index}],jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT v.company_id id, v.company_name, v.recommended_amount FROM t_bs_company_visit v JOIN ( SELECT company_id, MAX(created_date) AS max_created_date FROM t_bs_company_visit WHERE `status` = 'D' GROUP BY company_id ) latest ON v.company_id = latest.company_id AND v.created_date = latest.max_created_date WHERE v.`status` = 'D' AND v.company_id in
#{companyIdList[${index}],jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT company_id, credit_type, credit_amount, used_credit_amount, temporary_amount, risk_amount FROM t_bs_company_credit WHERE enable_flg = true and company_id IN
#{companyIdList[${index}],jdbcType=VARCHAR}
